name: Token Inspector
description: Live design token visualization grouped by category — color swatches, typography samples, spacing bars, elevation boxes. Values update reactively when style or mode changes.

slots.section-block: Per-category section with title and rendered token visualizations
slots.swatch-grid: Grid of color swatches for palette/neutral/surface tokens
slots.type-samples: Stacked typography samples at each scale
slots.spacing-bars: Horizontal bars showing spacing token values
